description_long: This bungalow features a modern, low-profile design with a flat roof and a combination of white exterior walls and dark horizontal slats that provide shade and visual interest. The structure is surrounded by a neatly trimmed hedge and sits on a green lawn, with paved walkways leading to the main entrance. Large windows are distributed across the facades, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The roof includes several open sections and skylights, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic and providing additional daylight. A glass-enclosed sunroom or patio is visible on one side, offering a semi-outdoor living area. The overall layout is sprawling and single-story, emphasizing horizontal lines and open, airy spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, white walls, dark slatted accents, large windows, and a glass-enclosed sunroom, surrounded by a green lawn and hedges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical window arrangement, and trimmed hedges along the facade.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat roof structure, grouped windows, and the expansive green lawn.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the glass-enclosed sunroom and a large paved area adjacent to the building.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing additional open roof sections and a more private, enclosed garden area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and corner windows
